extracted_metrics.forensic_reasoning_log: The auditor's report for Bulk Cement Corporation (India) Limited (page 211, Annexure to the Auditors' Report, point xi) explicitly states that the company has not incurred cash losses during the financial year covered by the audit and the immediately preceding financial year.
extracted_metrics.verbatim_source_text: The company does not have any accumulated losses at the end of the financial year and has not incurred cash losses during the financial year covered by our audit and the immediately preceding financial year.
extracted_metrics.surrounding_context: Annexure to the Auditors' Report (Referred to in paragraph 1 on Report on Other Legal and Regulatory Requirements.)
